title: RecipeRemover
description: Remove recipes with just a config
body:
[![ServerAtelier](https://www.serveratelier.com/assets/themes/atelier/assets/images/banner/sa_budget.png)](https://www.serveratelier.com/) ![Headline](https://i.imgur.com/EQBtX6i.png)
[](https://discord.gg/cV4cJyGXqF) [](https://globox1997.github.io/wiki/mods/RecipeRemover/) [](https://github.com/Globox1997/RecipeRemover/issues)


Remove recipes by adding the identifier like "minecraft:bucket" to the recipe list in the config. I made this mod in a few minutes cause there is no recipe remover mod for 1.19.2. This is server sided. For compatibility with EMI or REI, it will be required on the client side too.

[](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) This mod is developed for Fabric. There are no plans to develop a Forge version. Modpack Permission: Feel free to use it in any modpacks. Bug Report: Just report bugs at the github page.
